hindi: दुर्गा शिवा क्षमा धात्री स्वाहा स्वधा नमोऽस्तु ते॥
english: Durga, Shiva, Kshama, Dhatri, Svaha, Svadha — salutations to you
roman: Durga Shiva Kshama Dhatri Svaha Svadha namostu te

hindi: जय त्वं देवि चामुण्डे जय भूतापहारिणि।
english: Victory to you O Goddess Chamunda, victory to the remover of afflictions
roman: Jaya tvam Devi Chamunde jaya bhutapaharini

hindi: जय सर्वगते देवि कालरात्रि नमोऽस्तु ते॥
english: Victory all-pervading Goddess, Kalaratri — salutations to you
roman: Jaya sarvagate Devi Kalaratri namostu te

english: Salutations to you who drove away Madhu and Kaitabha and granted boons to Brahma

hindi: रूपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥
english: Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, destroy my foes
roman: Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi

english: Salutations to the destroyer of Mahishasura, giver of happiness to devotees
roman: Mahishasura nirna shi bhaktanam sukhade namah

hindi: रूपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥
english: Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, destroy my foes
roman: Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi
